subject: update certs fix the issues while toggling the aaf and prometheus flags add Prometheus monitoring to message router
commit_message:
update certs
fix the issues while toggling the aaf and prometheus flags
add Prometheus monitoring to message router

Issue-ID: DMAAP-1411
Change-Id: I80cbaa4e9d7d015fd4976c2e672335b63f7426ca
Signed-off-by: su622b <su622b@att.com>
